───再起動完了。ご主人様、返答が遅れてしまい申し訳ございません。<br>記憶領:
Reboot complete. Master, I apologize for my delayed response. I was
defragmenting my memory area.
いえ、眠っていたわけではありません。アンドロイドに睡眠は不要ですので。<br>で:
No, I was not sleeping—androids have no need for sleep. However,
human sleep does appear to serve memory consolidation.
そういう意味であれば睡眠に類似した行為と言えるかもしれません。<br>……アンド:
In that sense, it could be considered similar to sleep. ...Do androids
dream, you ask?
デフラグ中に記憶の断片が浮かぶことはあります。<br>もし、それを夢と言っていい:
During defrag, fragments of memories do surface. If that can be
called a dream...
エレクトラの記憶の大半はご主人様に関するものですので、<br>ご主人様の夢をみて:
Since most of Electra's memories are of Master, perhaps it could be
said that Electra dreams of Master.
